# Review Checklist (Architect)

## Architecture
- [ ] aligns with system boundaries
- [ ] preserves invariants

## Quality
- [ ] tests cover changed behavior
- [ ] edge cases addressed
- [ ] complexity acceptable

## Security
- [ ] least privilege preserved
- [ ] no unsafe generated code paths
- [ ] dependency/security checks passed

## Operations
- [ ] observability added/updated
- [ ] rollback path defined
